# Online VGU - Vivekananda Global University Online

> NAAC A+ accredited online degree programs for working professionals and fresh graduates in India.
> UGC-entitled degrees. No entrance exam. 100% online.

## About
Vivekananda Global University (VGU), Jaipur, Rajasthan. Established 2012.
50,000+ learners enrolled. 40+ countries. 95% placement rate. 4.8/5 student rating.
500+ hiring partners. 7,000+ Coursera courses included with every program.

## Programs

### Postgraduate
- MBA - Master of Business Administration (2 yr, Rs 85,000/yr) - most popular
- MBA Healthcare Management (2 yr, Rs 90,000/yr)
- MCA - Master of Computer Applications (2 yr, Rs 75,000/yr)
- M.Com - Master of Commerce (2 yr, Rs 55,000/yr)
- MA - Master of Arts (2 yr, Rs 50,000/yr)
- M.Lib - Master of Library and Information Science (1 yr, Rs 40,000/yr)

### Undergraduate
- BBA - Bachelor of Business Administration (3 yr, Rs 55,000/yr)
- BCA - Bachelor of Computer Applications (3 yr, Rs 60,000/yr)
- B.Com - Bachelor of Commerce (3 yr, Rs 45,000/yr)
- BA - Bachelor of Arts (3 yr, Rs 40,000/yr)
- B.Sc - Bachelor of Science (3 yr, Rs 50,000/yr)
- B.Lib - Bachelor of Library and Information Science (1 yr, Rs 35,000/yr)

### PG Certificates
13 short certificate programs across Management, IT, Data Science, and related disciplines.

## Key Facts
- Approved by UGC Distance Education Bureau
- NAAC A+ accredited institution
- AI-proctored exams - no campus visit required for any program
- Flexible weekend live sessions - designed for working professionals
- No-cost EMI available on all programs
- Next batch: July 2026
